# Business Stack Solutions - LLMs.txt
# AI crawler accessibility map for bizstacksolutions.com

## Site Info
Name: Business Stack Solutions
URL: https://bizstacksolutions.com
Description: Independent reviews and comparisons of business software for CRM, project management, invoicing, and productivity
Founder: Malik
Founded: 2026

## Content Sections

### Pillar Pages
- /pillar/crm - CRM software reviews and comparisons
- /pillar/project-mgmt - Project management tools
- /pillar/business-phone - Business phone systems
- /pillar/invoicing - Invoicing software
- /pillar/accounting - Accounting platforms
- /pillar/productivity - Productivity and automation tools

### Blog Articles
- /blog/best-crm-small-business - Best CRM for small business
- /blog/best-project-management-software - Top project management tools
- /blog/best-business-phone-system - Business phone solutions
- /blog/best-invoicing-software - Invoicing software reviews
- /blog/best-accounting-software - Accounting platform comparisons
- /blog/productivity-tools-2026 - Productivity tools 2026
- /blog/crm-vs-project-mgmt - CRM vs Project Management
- /blog/invoicing-vs-accounting - Invoicing vs Accounting software
- /blog/business-software-stack - Building your business tech stack
- /blog/phone-system-features - Business phone features guide

### Legal Pages
- /legal/privacy - Privacy Policy
- /legal/terms - Terms of Service
- /legal/disclosure - Affiliate Disclosure
- /legal/about - About Us

## Affiliate Programs
We review and link to: HubSpot, Pipedrive, Monday.com, Asana, ClickUp, RingCentral, Grasshopper, FreshBooks, QuickBooks, Xero, Zapier

## Structured Data
This site implements JSON-Lord schema:
- WebSite
- Organization
- Article
- Product (review)
- FAQPage
- BreadcrumbList
